response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: Navigating conversations on COVID vaccines makes me feel a bit uncomfortable, especially since I'm not very educated in the medical field. My husband works as an engineer, so he can help explain some things clearly, but it's still tricky because we have three kids to think about. They're all healthy now, but protecting them is crucial.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Considering my low openness score and moderate agreeableness level, I prefer straightforward information over complex debates. My high conscientiousness makes me want to do the right thing for my family, so I rely on reliable sources like our local health department in Milan or trusted doctors from our community who understand Hinduism's perspective on health.
